chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P No. D-201 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 15-03-2022 Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of instant constitutional petition before this Court on merits, if subject to qualification the petitioner is permitted to apply for any of the post in Food Department, whenever those posts are advertised formally by the respondents. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Abdul Salam/P.A
